title: 1 Day after the Due Date, notify on the Following Business Day
excerpt:

posts.author: amorrison (Arianna Morrison)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We utilize many automations that notify Task Owners when an item is past due. The problem is that when the due date is on a Friday, the notification automation runs on a Saturday when no one is in office, and it gets lost by the time Monday rolls around.

What are you trying to achieve

When 1 day past the deadline falls on a non-work day, wait to run the past due notification until the next business day.

Ex. When item is due on Friday, and was not complete, wait to send the notification that it is past due until Monday.
